title: [March 26, 2026] Proposed Changes to Spark for Upcoming Spell
post1Raw:
## Summary

1. [Ethereum] Spark Treasury - Spark Foundation and Spark Assets Foundation Grants for Q2 2026
2. [Ethereum] SparkLend - Reactivate WBTC
3. [Ethereum] Spark Liquidity Layer - Add USAT transferAsset Rate Limit to Anchorage
4. [Ethereum] Spark Liquidity Layer - Add USDT transferAsset Rate Limit to Anchorage
~~5. [Ethereum] Spark Liquidity Layer - Onboard Uniswap v4 USAT/USDS Pool~~

Recurring Items

6. [Ethereum] SparkLend - Claim SparkLend Reserves (Exec)
7. [Ethereum] Spark Treasury - Transfer Excess USDS from SubDAO Proxy for SPK Buybacks

## Rationale

### [Ethereum] Spark Treasury - Spark Foundation and Spark Assets Foundation Grants for Q2 2026

Phoenix Labs, in its role as a nested contributor, proposes a grant of 1.1M USDS per month from the SubDAO Proxy to the Spark Foundation for a period of three (3) months to cover Q2-2026 Spark Foundation expenses.

Additionally, Phoenix Labs proposes a one time grant of 100,000 USDS per month for a period of three (3) months to cover Q2-2026 Spark Assets Foundation expenses..

**Purpose**

The purpose of this grant is to enable the Spark Foundation to fulfill its mandate of promoting the growth and development of Spark, and for Spark Asset Foundation to fulfill its mandate of safeguarding assets deployed via the Spark Liquidity Layer. Grant funds will support essential activities, including but not limited to:

* Engineering and product development
* Community engagement and growth initiatives
* Research and governance contributions
* Infrastructure and operational maintenance
* Administrative operations

**Transfers**

Transfers will be executed via Spark Spells included in Sky Executive Votes, unless otherwise mutually agreed by Sky and Spark. We propose for the first transfers (covering April 2026) to be executed as part of the March 26, 2026 spell.

**Change summary:**

* Spark Foundation Grant
  * Recipient address: 0x92e4629a4510AF5819d7D1601464C233599fF5ec
  * Transfer amount: 1,100,000 USDS
* Spark Asset Foundation Grant
  * Recipient address: 0xEabCb8C0346Ac072437362f1692706BA5768A911
  * Transfer amount: 100,000 USDS

### [Ethereum] SparkLend - Reactivate WBTC

After recently conducting additional due diligence on WBTC. Please see the separate post [here](https://forum.skyeco.com/t/march-15-2026-wbtc-asset-review/27769) for details.

Based on our reviews, we consider WBTC to fit within SparkLend’s risk posture. There is also a strong business case to support onboarding given deep onchain liquidity and continued high circulating supply and usage of the WBTC token. We plan to re-enable usage of WBTC as a collateral asset, initially featuring a somewhat lower LTV and liquidation threshold vs cbBTC and a moderate cap automator configuration. These parameters are intended to offer a competitive user experience while minimizing platform risk as the asset is re-enabled, and may be adjusted in future proposals based on demand and observed usage patterns.

WBTC risk is substantially mitigated via usage of a WBTCUSD price oracle (enabling prompt liqudiation of collateral during any potential depeg scenarios) as well as inclusion of WBTC in the kill switch oracle mechanism (preventing any new borrows across SparkLend in case of a WBTC price divergence below 0.95 BTC). Spark also features a freezer multisig which can disable borrowing activities in an emergency as an additional layer of defence.

Note that borrowing of WBTC will not be reenabled at this time, as historically we have seen limited demand and usage for borrowing assets in SparkLend other than ETH and stablecoins.

**Change summary:**

* SparkLend WBTC
  * Cap automator parameters
    * Deposits
      * max: 3,000
      * gap: 500
      * ttl: 12 hours
    * Borrows
      * max: 1
      * gap: 1
      * ttl: 12 hours
  * LTV: 77%
  * LT: 78%

### [Ethereum] Spark Liquidity Layer - Add USAT transferAsset Rate Limit to Anchorage

Anchorage is the issuer of Tether’s onshore, GENIUS compliant stablecoin USAT. It is expected that swaps and liquidity facilities between USDT and USAT will be available on the Anchorage platform in the near future. Enabling transferAsset rate limits for both USDT and USAT from SLL into Anchorage will allow Spark to rebalance liquidity efficiently between the two stablecoins and source initial USAT liquidity needed to bootstrap the proposed USAT/USDS Uniswap v4 pool noted below. We are proposing a relatively high daily throughput (slope) based on anticipated liquidity needs to manage USDT vs USAT inventory that could potentially stretch into mid to high nine figure levels.

**Change summary:**

* transferAsset (USAT)
  * Address: 0x49506C3Aa028693458d6eE816b2EC28522946872
  * maxAmount: 5 million
  * slope: 250 million

### [Ethereum] Spark Liquidity Layer - Add USDT transferAsset Rate Limit to Anchorage

Similar to above, we propose adding a USDT transferAsset rate limit to enable rebalancing liquidity between USDT and USAT, and sourcing initial USAT liquidity needed to support the planned Uniswap v4 deployment.

**Change summary:**

* transferAsset (USDT)
  * Address: 0x49506C3Aa028693458d6eE816b2EC28522946872
  * maxAmount: 5 million
  * slope: 250 million

~~### [Ethereum] Spark Liquidity Layer - Onboard Uniswap v4 USAT/USDS Pool~~

We will no longer plan to onboard a Uniswap v4 USAT/USDS pool in this spell, as we are going to use a hook-integrated pool for this usecase and the hook is still in the development/audit process. This pool onboard will be included in a future spell when ready.

### [Ethereum] SparkLend - Claim SparkLend Reserves (Exec)

This is a recurring item that can go directly to executive vote based on approval in the Atlas. Claiming and consolidating SparkLend reserves increases Spark’s available risk capital, allowing for more revenue generating capacity for the SLL.

**Parameter summary:**

* Claim all reserves
* Transfer USD stablecoin reserves to ALM Proxy
* Transfer non-USD stablecoin reserves to Spark Operations Multisig 0x2E1b01adABB8D4981863394bEa23a1263CBaeDfC to be liquidated

### [Ethereum] Spark Treasury - Transfer Excess USDS from SubDAO Proxy for SPK Buybacks

Per Atlas section A.6.1.1.1.3.4, Spark transfers a portion of excess value in the SubDAO Proxy to be used for SPK buybacks each month. The details of this month’s transfer is noted in this [thread](https://forum.sky.money/t/spark-subdao-proxy-management-updates/27734/2?u=phoenixlabs).

**Change summary:**

* Transfer 414,215 USDS to Spark Operations Multisig (0x2E1b01adABB8D4981863394bEa23a1263CBaeDfC) for SPK buybacks
